item.title: Cow's Head
item.description: Big Fat Cow’s Head Cooked Ama Zulu Style

item.title: Steamed Bread
item.description: The Taste of a Long Lasting Tradition Carefully Passed Through Generation

item.title: Beans Salad
item.description: Our beloved vegetable garden does not disappoint!

item.title: Tripe & Butternut
item.description: Deliciously slow cooked tripe served with Butternut and Creamy Spinach.

item.title: Red Pepper Miso Wings
